title: santalodes nitidum
intro: Santalodes nitidum, also known as Sandalwood Root, is a type of plant that belongs to the Santalaceae family and is native to Australia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Santalodes nitidum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Santalodes nitidum include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
